mapper.update: UPDATE user_quota SET interview_quota = interview_quota - 1, daily_interview_used = daily_interview_used + 1, total_interview_used = total_interview_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND interview_quota > 0 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET resume_quota = resume_quota - 1, daily_resume_used = daily_resume_used + 1, total_resume_used = total_resume_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resume_quota > 0 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_interview_used = daily_interview_used + 1, total_interview_used = total_interview_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_interview_used < #{dailyLimit} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_quota SET daily_resume_used = daily_resume_used + 1, total_resume_used = total_resume_used + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND daily_resume_used < #{dailyLimit} AND is_deleted = 0
